title: Hitman Office Level
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for turning a corporate office into a readable top-down stealth-game level with patrol routes, objective UI, and layered HUD composition.

en.title: Hitman Office Level
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for turning a corporate office into a readable top-down stealth-game level with patrol routes, objective UI, and layered HUD composition.

zh-CN.title: Hitman 关卡 · 办公室游戏化
zh-CN.description: 把公司办公室转成俯视潜行动作关卡: NPC 巡逻路线、任务目标 UI、HUD 与办公空间布局必须清楚叠合。
